skills.name: Quick Strike
skills.description: Base 10 DMG. Win streak grants +20% DMG bonus. Reliable and fast.

skills.name: Drain Touch
skills.description: Deals damage and applies bleed to opponent while healing you over 3 rounds.

skills.name: Whiplash
skills.description: Accuracy-based DMG. Deals double damage if opponent is on a win streak.

skills.name: Soulbreak
skills.description: Deals damage and steals 2 CP from opponent. Bonus DMG at 8+ CP.

skills.name: Rupture
skills.description: High risk! Deals damage based on opponent's typos. 0 DMG if they have 0 typos.

skills.name: Deathmark
skills.description: Marks the opponent to deal flat bonus damage over the next 2 rounds.
